subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One calleth out from the Most Great Prison unto all the peoples of the world: "O peoples! Behold ye..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مظلوم عالم جمیع امم را از شطر سجن اعظم ندا میفرماید یا قوم انظروا ثم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @mystical themes, @proclamation to the people of the world, @spiritual transformation
